AgentPay Shield

Polkadot-ready private intent settlement for autonomous agents.

Create IntentFulfill IntentIntent Explorer
WalletNot connected
AgentPay Shield

Private agent payments with a cleaner operator workflow.

This frontend wraps the AgentPay contract into three practical flows so a buyer and a vendor can move from intent creation to settlement without dropping into raw calldata.

Escrow

Create Intent

Generate a private commitment, lock escrow, and submit the intent from your wallet.

Open flowSettlement

Fulfill Intent

Act as the vendor, derive the proof hash for the starter contract, and receive payment.

Open flowVisibility

Intent Explorer

Inspect an intent by hash, verify buyer, amount, and whether settlement is complete.

Open flow
